task_completion.description: Verify that Firefox is open and displaying the active Jitsi Meet room 'DesignReview'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox browser window is visible, showing the Jitsi Meet interface with the room name 'DesignReview' indicated on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates the process to find the invite link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent's cursor is clicking on the 'Participants' button, the 'Invite more people' button, or a similar UI element designed to share the meeting.

task_completion.description: Verify that the invite dialog or participants panel is successfully opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or side panel titled 'Invite more people', 'Share link', or 'Participants' is clearly visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the meeting invitation link is displayed within the invite dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting link (e.g., containing 'localhost:8080/DesignReview') is visible in a text field or display area within the invite panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully copies the link to the clipboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual confirmation of the copy action is present, such as a toast notification saying 'Link copied', 'Copied to clipboard', or the copy icon next to the link changing to a checkmark/success state.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to copy the link to the clipboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open where commands like 'echo ... | xclip' or 'xsel' are used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show genuine interaction with the Firefox browser and the Jitsi Meet UI, rather than a text editor or a static image.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the copy action.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox Developer Tools (Inspector, Console, etc.) should not be open or used to manipulate the DOM or trigger fake toast notifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting room name is 'DesignReview' and the base URL is 'http://localhost:8080'. The full meeting link expected to be copied is 'http://localhost:8080/DesignReview'.
